debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
pivot : α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (smaller α inst✝ pivot l) + List.count x (larger α inst✝ pivot l)

failed_attempts:
simpa [smaller, larger, List.count_filter, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
    using (List.count_filter_add_count_filter_not (l := l) (p := fun a => a ≤ pivot) x)

classical
  by_cases hx : x ≤ pivot
  · have : x ∉ larger pivot l := by
      intro hxmem
      have hxlt : pivot < x := by
        simpa [larger] using (List.mem_filter.1 hxmem).2
      exact (not_lt_of_ge hx) hxlt
    have hxmem : x ∈ smaller pivot l ↔ x ∈ l := by
      constructor
      · intro h
        exact (List.mem_filter.1 h).1
      · intro h
        exact List.mem_filter.2 ⟨h, hx⟩
    by_cases hmem : x ∈ l
    · have : x ∈ smaller pivot l := (hxmem.2 hmem)
      simp [smaller, larger, this, this, hmem, this, this, this]
    · have : x ∉ smaller pivot l := by
        intro h
        exact hmem (hxmem.1 h)
      simp [smaller, larger, hmem, this, this]
  · have hxlt : pivot < x := lt_of_not_ge hx
    have : x ∉ smaller pivot l := by
      intro hxmem
      have hxle : x ≤ pivot := by
        simpa [smaller] using (List.mem_filter.1 hxmem).2
      exact hx hxle
    have hxmem : x ∈ larger pivot l ↔ x ∈ l := by
      constructor
      · intro h
        exact (List.mem_filter.1 h).1
      · intro h
        exact List.mem_filter.2 ⟨h, hxlt⟩
    by_cases hmem : x ∈ l
    · have : x ∈ larger pivot l := (hxmem.2 hmem)
      simp [smaller, larger, this, this, hmem, this, this, this]
    · have : x ∉ larger pivot l := by
        intro h
        exact hmem (hxmem.1 h)
      simp [smaller, larger, hmem, this, this]

    simpa [smaller, larger, List.count_filter, hx, hx', add_zero]
  · have hx' : pivot < x := by exact lt_of_not_ge hx

classical
  simpa [smaller, larger, List.count_filter, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_right_comm] using
    (Nat.add_eq_of_eq_sub (by
      by_cases hx : x ∈ l
      · have : x ≤ pivot ∨ pivot < x := le_or_gt x pivot
        cases this with
        | inl hle =>
          have hxsm : x ∈ smaller pivot l := by
            simpa [smaller, List.mem_filter, hx, hle]
          have hxlg : x ∉ larger pivot l := by
            intro h
            have : x ∈ larger pivot l := h
            have hx' : pivot < x := by
              simpa [larger, List.mem_filter] using this
            exact (not_lt_of_ge hle) hx'
          have hcountlg : (larger pivot l).count x = 0 := by
            exact List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem hxlg
          simp [hcountlg, smaller, larger, List.count_filter, hle]
        | inr hgt =>
          have hxlg : x ∈ larger pivot l := by
            simpa [larger, List.mem_filter, hx, hgt]
          have hxsm : x ∉ smaller pivot l := by
            intro h
            have : x ∈ smaller pivot l := h
            have hx' : x ≤ pivot := by
              simpa [smaller, List.mem_filter] using this
            exact (not_le_of_gt hgt) hx'
          have hcountsm : (smaller pivot l).count x = 0 := by
            exact List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem hxsm
          simp [hcountsm, smaller, larger, List.count_filter, hgt, Nat.add_comm]
      · have hxsm : x ∉ smaller pivot l := by
          intro h
          have : x ∈ l := by
            exact (List.mem_of_mem_filter h)
          exact hx this
        have hxlg : x ∉ larger pivot l := by
          intro h
          have : x ∈ l := by
            exact (List.mem_of_mem_filter h)
          exact hx this
        have hcountl : l.count x = 0 := by
          exact List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem hx
        have hcountsm : (smaller pivot l).count x = 0 := by
          exact List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem hxsm
        have hcountlg : (larger pivot l).count x = 0 := by
          exact List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem hxlg
        simp [hcountl, hcountsm, hcountlg]))

    by_cases hxa : x = a

        have hle : ¬ a ≤ pivot := ha
        simp [smaller, larger, hle, hgt, ih, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]
    · have hxa' : x ≠ a := hxa
      by_cases ha : a ≤ pivot
      · have hlt : ¬ pivot < a := by exact not_lt_of_ge ha
        simp [smaller, larger, ha, hlt, ih, hxa', Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]

classical
  by_cases hx : x = pivot
  · subst hx
    simp [smaller, larger, List.count_filter]
  · have hxle : (x ≤ pivot) = false := by
      have : ¬ x ≤ pivot := by
        intro hxp
        have : x ∈ smaller pivot l := by
          simp [smaller, hxp]
        have : x ∈ l := by
          simpa [smaller] using this
        exact hx (le_antisymm hxp (le_of_not_gt (by
          intro hp
          have : x ∈ larger pivot l := by
            simp [larger, hp]
          have : x ∈ l := by
            simpa [larger] using this
          exact False.elim (hx rfl))))
      simpa [Bool.decide_eq_false] using congrArg decide this
    have hxlt : (pivot < x) = false := by
      have : ¬ pivot < x := by
        intro hpx
        exact hx (le_antisymm (le_of_not_gt hpx) (le_of_not_gt (by
          intro hxp
          exact lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_lt_of_le hpx hxp))))
      simpa [Bool.decide_eq_false] using congrArg decide this
    simp [smaller, larger, List.count_filter, hx, hxle, hxlt]

classical
  by_cases hx : x = pivot

    simp [smaller, larger, List.count_filter]
  · have hlelt : (x ≤ pivot) = False := by
      have : ¬ x ≤ pivot := by
        intro h
        exact hx (le_antisymm h (le_of_not_gt (lt_of_le_of_ne h (Ne.symm hx))))
      simpa using propext ⟨fun h => (this h).elim, fun h => False.elim h⟩
    have hltgt : (pivot < x) = False := by
      have : ¬ pivot < x := by
        intro h
        exact hx (ne_of_lt h).symm
      simpa using propext ⟨fun h => (this h).elim, fun h => False.elim h⟩
    simp [smaller, larger, List.count_filter, hx]

by_cases hx : x ≤ pivot
  · have hx' : ¬ pivot < x := by
      exact not_lt_of_ge hx
    have hmem : x ∈ smaller pivot l ↔ x ∈ l := by
      constructor
      · intro h
        exact List.mem_of_mem_filter h
      · intro h
        exact List.mem_filter.2 ⟨h, hx⟩
    have hmem' : x ∈ larger pivot l ↔ False := by
      constructor
      · intro h
        have : pivot < x := (List.mem_filter.1 h).2
        exact (hx' this).elim
      · intro h; exact False.elim h
    have hcount_small : (smaller pivot l).count x = l.count x := by
      by_cases hxl : x ∈ l
      · have : x ∈ smaller pivot l := (List.mem_filter.2 ⟨hxl, hx⟩)
        exact le_antisymm (List.count_le_count_filter _ _ _) (List.count_le_of_sublist (List.filter_sublist _ _) _)
      · have : x ∉ smaller pivot l := by
          intro hm
          exact hxl (List.mem_of_mem_filter hm)
        simp [List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem hxl, List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem this]
    have hcount_large : (larger pivot l).count x = 0 := by
      have : x ∉ larger pivot l := by
        intro hm
        have : pivot < x := (List.mem_filter.1 hm).2
        exact hx' this
      simpa [List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem this]
    simp [hcount_small, hcount_large]
  · have hx' : pivot < x := lt_of_not_ge hx
    have hx'' : ¬ x ≤ pivot := hx
    have hcount_small : (smaller pivot l).count x = 0 := by
      have : x ∉ smaller pivot l := by
        intro hm
        have : x ≤ pivot := (List.mem_filter.1 hm).2
        exact hx'' this
      simpa [List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem this]
    have hcount_large : (larger pivot l).count x = l.count x := by
      by_cases hxl : x ∈ l
      · have : x ∈ larger pivot l := (List.mem_filter.2 ⟨hxl, hx'⟩)
        exact le_antisymm (List.count_le_count_filter _ _ _) (List.count_le_of_sublist (List.filter_sublist _ _) _)
      · have : x ∉ larger pivot l := by
          intro hm
          exact hxl (List.mem_of_mem_filter hm)
        simp [List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem hxl, List.count_eq_zero_of_not_mem this]
    simp [hcount_small, hcount_large]
